name: Regrow Agriculture Sustainability and MRV Platform API
what_it_does: Regrow Agriculture sustainability and measurement, reporting, and verification (MRV) platform REST API for food companies, agricultural retailers, and sustainability programs to access Milkyweed science-based crop modeling, field-level GHG emissions analysis, carbon sequestration measurement, and supply chain sustainability reporting — enabling food producers and retailers to measure Scope 3 agricultural emissions, verify regenerative agriculture practices, and generate credible sustainability metrics through Regrow's integration of satellite data, crop modeling, and agronomic science. Enables AI agents to manage field emissions analysis for Scope 3 agricultural GHG automation, handle practice verification for regenerative agriculture confirmation automation, access carbon sequestration for soil carbon credit measurement automation, retrieve supply chain report for food company sustainability automation, manage farmer enrollment for sustainability program management automation, handle satellite monitoring for crop practice remote sensing automation, access Milkyweed model for scientifically-validated crop simulation automation, retrieve biodiversity metrics for nature-positive agriculture reporting automation, manage sustainability certificate for food brand claims verification automation, and integrate Regrow with food company ESG reporting, supply chain management, and sustainability certification platforms for agricultural sustainability automation.
use_cases: Measuring Scope 3 agricultural GHG emissions for food company supply chain sustainability reporting automation agents
Verifying regenerative agriculture practice adoption by farmers for supply chain sustainability program automation agents
Generating science-based carbon sequestration measurements for carbon credit program MRV automation agents
Integrating Regrow sustainability data with food company ESG reporting and CSRD compliance automation agents
not_for: Non-agricultural sustainability (Regrow focuses on crop agriculture, not forestry, livestock, or marine)
Real-time farm operations management (Regrow is sustainability analytics, not operational farm management)
Carbon credit trading (Regrow provides MRV data, not a carbon marketplace)
best_when: A food company, agricultural retailer, or carbon program wanting AI agents to measure Scope 3 emissions, verify regenerative practices, and generate credible sustainability metrics through Regrow's science-based crop modeling and satellite data platform.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE PARTNERSHIP REQUIRED: Regrow API requires enterprise partnership agreement with food companies or program operators; automated developer self-service access assumption creates no API access; automated must establish Regrow enterprise partnership. FIELD DATA COVERAGE REQUIRED: Regrow analysis requires field boundary data, crop history, and management practices; automated analysis-without-field-data assumption creates insufficient_data for modeling; automated must provide complete field and management history for accurate Regrow analysis. MODELING TAKES TIME: Regrow crop and GHG modeling is computationally intensive; automated instant results assumption creates processing delay for large field portfolios; automated must implement async job pattern for large-scale modeling requests. SCIENTIFIC UNCERTAINTY MUST BE COMMUNICATED: Regrow MRV results include uncertainty ranges; automated point-estimate-only sustainability claims assumption creates misleading marketing; automated must communicate uncertainty ranges in sustainability reporting.

auth.notes: Regrow uses OAuth2 for enterprise API authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2019 (spun out of Gro Intelligence). Products: Milkyweed crop model, Scope 3 emissions analysis, practice MRV, carbon sequestration measurement, supply chain sustainability reporting, satellite monitoring. SDKs: None public. Enterprise partnerships with food companies. Global crop coverage. Backed by Breakthrough Energy Ventures, Dara Khosrowshahi. Competes with Agreena and Indigo Ag for supply chain sustainability MRV.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Pilot evaluation for enterprise partners; production requires enterprise contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-acre or per-farmer pricing; enterprise contract for supply chain programs; custom sustainability reporting packages
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Enterprise contract. Per-acre or per-farmer. Supply chain sustainability focus. Global coverage.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; modeling APIs have higher latency for complex analyses

known_agent_gotchas: MODELING IS COMPUTATIONALLY INTENSIVE: Regrow GHG and carbon modeling can take minutes to hours for large field portfolios; automated synchronous result assumption creates timeout; automated must implement async polling pattern with job ID for modeling completion

COMPLETE FIELD HISTORY REQUIRED: Accurate Milkyweed modeling requires multi-year crop rotation, tillage, and fertilization history; automated current-year-only data assumption creates degraded model accuracy; automated must provide 5+ years of management history for best results

UNCERTAINTY RANGES ARE INHERENT: Regrow MRV results include confidence intervals, not point estimates; automated single-number GHG emission assumption creates overprecise sustainability claims; automated must handle and communicate uncertainty ranges in sustainability reports

ENTERPRISE ACCESS IS GATED: Regrow API requires approved enterprise partnership; automated public API developer access assumption creates no available endpoint; automated must establish enterprise partnership before integration development

SATELLITE DATA HAS COVERAGE GAPS: Regrow satellite monitoring has cloud coverage and temporal gaps; automated 100% field monitoring coverage assumption creates data_not_available for specific time periods; automated must handle missing satellite data gracefully
agent_readiness.security_notes: Agricultural sustainability MRV. GDPR, CSRD, GHG Protocol. OAuth2. US/EU. Farm and supply chain sustainability data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Agricultural sustainability. GDPR, CSRD, GHG Protocol. OAuth2. US/EU. Farm and sustainability data.
